Bharati Vidyapeeth Common Entrance Test.note: BVP CET is largely a merit-list based exam; no college/branch-wise opening-closing rank table for the BVP CET exam itself was found on official or portal pages. Cutoffs that exist for Bharati Vidyapeeth colleges are tied to OTHER exams (MHT-CET/JEE Main/IPU CET), not BVP CET, so they were not included.

Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Entr.note: BIT Mesra admits via JEE Main + JoSAA. JoSAA closing ranks: 2024 (CSE & Mechanical, all categories) from phodu.club; 2023 (8 branches, Open/OBC, AI & Home State quota) from pw.live. Opening ranks not published in these tables.

Central Sanskrit University Entrance Exa.note: Admission via merit list (CUET-based, 70% entrance + 30% academics). No college/branch-wise opening-closing rank or category cutoff table is published publicly; only merit lists. No rank rows available.

Chandigarh Polytechnic Entrance.note: Chandigarh polytechnic (diploma) admission is merit-based on Class 10 marks; official portal chdpolyadmissions.nic.in was unreachable (connection refused) and no portal publishes college/branch-wise opening-closing rank cutoff tables for it. Search results only returned PEC/CCET B.Tech (JEE/JAC) cutoffs, which are a different exam.

Chennai Mathematical Institute Entrance.note: CMI admits via its own entrance exam + interview and publishes only a merit/selection list (names/roll numbers). No college/branch/category opening-closing rank cutoff table exists. No rank rows available.
